<ruby>犹<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yóu</rt></ruby><ruby>大<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dà</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>去<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qu</rt></ruby>。<ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>华<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huá</rt></ruby><ruby>将<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby class="CharOverride-1">迦<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Jiā</rt></ruby><ruby>南<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nán</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>比<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Bǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>利<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lì</rt></ruby><ruby>洗<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>交<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiāo</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>手<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>中<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhōnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>比<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Bǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>色<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sè</rt></ruby><ruby>击<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jī</rt></ruby><ruby>杀<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shā</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">le</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>万<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wàn</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>又<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yòu</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nà</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">li</rt></ruby><ruby>遇<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yù</rt></ruby><ruby>见<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>亚<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yà</rt></ruby><ruby>多<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">duō</rt></ruby><ruby>尼<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ní</rt></ruby><ruby>比<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>色<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sè</rt></ruby>，<ruby>与<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>争<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhēnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>战<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhàn</rt></ruby>，<ruby>杀<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shā</rt></ruby><ruby>败<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bài</rt></ruby><ruby class="CharOverride-1">迦<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiā</rt></ruby><ruby>南<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nán</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>比<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Bǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>利<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lì</rt></ruby><ruby>洗<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>亚<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yà</rt></ruby><ruby>多<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">duō</rt></ruby><ruby>尼<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ní</rt></ruby><ruby>比<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>色<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sè</rt></ruby><ruby>逃<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">táo</rt></ruby><ruby>跑<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">pǎo</rt></ruby>，<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>追<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhuī</rt></ruby><ruby>赶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡǎn</rt></ruby>，<ruby>拿<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ná</rt></ruby><ruby>住<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhù</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby>，<ruby>砍<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>断<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">duàn</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>手<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>脚<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>大<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dà</rt></ruby><ruby>拇<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mu</rt></ruby><ruby>指<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhǐ</rt></ruby>。

class="_idGenRuby-3">sè</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>前<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qián</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>七<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qī</rt></ruby><ruby>十<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shí</rt></ruby><ruby>个<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>王<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">le</rt></ruby>。”<ruby>于<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yú</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt <ruby>犹<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yóu</rt></ruby><ruby>大<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dà</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ren</rt></ruby><ruby>攻<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>打<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>路<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lù</rt></ruby><ruby>撒<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sā</rt></ruby><ruby>冷<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lěnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>将<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>城<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>攻<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>取<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qǔ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>用<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>刀<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dāo</rt></ruby><ruby>杀<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shā</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">le</rt></ruby><ruby>城<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>内<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nèi</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby>，<ruby>并<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>且<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qiě</rt></ruby><ruby>放<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>火<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>烧<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shāo</rt></ruby><ruby>城<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chénɡ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>后<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Hòu</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lái</rt></ruby><ruby>犹<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yóu</rt></ruby><ruby>大<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dà</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ren</rt></ruby><ruby>下<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xià</rt></ruby><ruby>去<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qu</rt></ruby>，<ruby>与<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>住<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhù</rt></ruby><ruby>山<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shān</rt></ruby><ruby>地<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dì</rt></ruby>、<ruby>南<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nán</rt></ruby><ruby>地<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dì</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>高<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡāo</rt></ruby><ruby>原<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yuán</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby class="CharOverride-1">迦<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Jiā</rt></ruby><ruby>南<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nán</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>争<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhēnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>战<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhàn</rt></ruby>。
